concept: I want a survival game where the player must maintain a small campfire that serves as the only safe haven in an ever-shifting forest filled with shadow creatures. The forest rearranges itself whenever the fire dims below a certain threshold, requiring constant gathering of specific fuel types that affect flame properties like duration, brightness, and heat. Different fire properties deter different types of shadow creatures, requiring strategic fuel combinations as night progresses and more dangerous entities emerge. Players slowly uncover the history of the forest through artifacts that can be found during expeditions away from the fire. The ultimate goal is to locate and ignite specific ancient beacons that will permanently push back the darkness from sections of the forest.
